import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import axios from"axios";import{LineChart,Line,XAxis,YAxis,Tooltip,CartesianGrid,PieChart,Pie,Cell,BarChart,Bar,Legend}from"recharts";import"./Dashboard.css";/* ================================
   API BASE URL
================================== */import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const API="https://finpulse-backend-r1n8.onrender.com";function Dashboard(){const navigate=useNavigate();const[kpis,setKpis]=useState(null);const[forecast,setForecast]=useState([]);const[prediction,setPrediction]=useState(null);const[risk,setRisk]=useState("");const[blockchain,setBlockchain]=useState("");const[riskData,setRiskData]=useState([]);const[comparisonData,setComparisonData]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const COLORS=["#22c55e","#f59e0b","#ef4444"];/* ================================
     AUTH CHECK
  ================================== */useEffect(()=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("token");if(!token){navigate("/");return;}loadDashboard(token);},[navigate]);/* ================================
     LOAD DASHBOARD DATA
  ================================== */const loadDashboard=async token=>{try{setLoading(true);const headers={Authorization:`Bearer ${token}`};const[kpiRes,forecastRes,predictionRes,chartRes,anomalyRes,riskRes,blockchainRes]=await Promise.all([axios.get(`${API}/kpis`,{headers}),axios.get(`${API}/revenue-forecast`,{headers}),axios.get(`${API}/forecast-revenue`,{headers}),axios.get(`${API}/chart-data`,{headers}),axios.get(`${API}/classify-risk-xgb`,{headers}),axios.get(`${API}/hash-ml-results`,{headers}),axios.get(`${API}/verify-integrity`,{headers})]);setKpis(kpiRes.data);setForecast(forecastRes.data);setPrediction(predictionRes.data);setComparisonData(chartRes.data);/* ===== Risk Distribution ===== */const results=anomalyRes.data.results||[];let low=0;let medium=0;let high=0;results.forEach(item=>{if(item.classified_risk==="Low")low++;else if(item.classified_risk==="Medium")medium++;else if(item.classified_risk==="High")high++;});setRiskData([{name:"Low Risk",value:low},{name:"Medium Risk",value:medium},{name:"High Risk",value:high}]);setRisk(`Total Records Analysed: ${riskRes.data.total_records}`);setBlockchain(blockchainRes.data.status);}catch(error){console.error("Dashboard Load Error:",error);alert("Error loading dashboard data ❌");}finally{setLoading(false);}};/* ================================
     CSV UPLOAD
  ================================== */const uploadCSV=async e=>{const file=e.target.files[0];if(!file)return;const token=localStorage.getItem("token");const formData=new FormData();formData.append("file",file);try{await axios.post(`${API}/upload-csv`,formData,{headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${token}`}});alert("CSV uploaded successfully ✅");loadDashboard(token);}catch(error){console.error("Upload error:",error);alert("CSV upload failed ❌");}};/* ================================
     LOGOUT
  ================================== */const logout=()=>{localStorage.removeItem("token");navigate("/");};/* ================================
     LOADING SCREEN
  ================================== */if(loading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{style:{textAlign:"center",marginTop:"120px"},children:"Loading Financial Analytics Dashboard..."});}/* ================================
     FORECAST DATA
  ================================== */const forecastChart=[...forecast];if(prediction){forecastChart.push({month:"Next",revenue:prediction.next_month_prediction});}/* ================================
     DASHBOARD UI
  ================================== */return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"dashboard",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"sidebar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"FinPulse"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:logout,children:"Logout"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"sidebar-security",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"security-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Records Analysed"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:risk})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"security-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Blockchain Integrity"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:blockchain})]})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"main",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Financial Analytics Dashboard"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"upload-box",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Upload Financial CSV"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"file",accept:".csv",onChange:uploadCSV})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"kpi-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"kpi-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Total Revenue"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["\u20B9 ",Number((kpis===null||kpis===void 0?void 0:kpis.total_revenue)||0).toLocaleString()]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"kpi-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Total Expense"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["\u20B9 ",Number((kpis===null||kpis===void 0?void 0:kpis.total_expense)||0).toLocaleString()]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"kpi-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Net Profit"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["\u20B9 ",Number((kpis===null||kpis===void 0?void 0:kpis.net_profit)||0).toLocaleString()]})]})]})]})]});}export default Dashboard;
